This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Taylor Farms to launch recall after iceberg lettuce is tied to outbreak - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Taylor Farms to launch recall after iceberg lettuce is tied to outbreak  The Washington Post

  3. Cyclosporiasis Is Solved! Right?  The Atlantic
  4. Salmonella, E. coli, norovirus are some of the common foodborne germs  WMUR
  5. Taylor Farms to Remove Products After Lettuce Is Linked to Cyclospora Cases  The New York Times

item.description:

item.title: Exclusive | SpaceX in Talks to Provide Computing Power for Pentagon’s AI Push - WSJ
item.description:
1. Exclusive | SpaceX in Talks to Provide Computing Power for Pentagon’s AI Push  WSJ
  2. Musk's SpaceX in talks to supply the Pentagon with computing power, WSJ reports  Reuters
  3. As SpaceX grapples with its stock trading below its IPO price, it is pitching billions of dollars’ worth of AI computing capacity to the Pentagon.  Moomoo
  4. SpaceX in discussions to provide computing to Pentagon: report (SPCX:NASDAQ)  Seeking Alpha
  5. SpaceX in Talks to Sell Computing Power to Pentagon, WSJ Says  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Fairlife pauses US production after cyberattack breached milk brand's systems - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.source: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.title: SpaceX Set to Wipe Out $1 Trillion in Value as Shares Slide - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
